name: Justice and Advent.
description:
Artwork from their chess battle stream. Was going to use some more artwork from XTEcchi, but the file size was too big. I really want them to make the file size we can have for images bigger, also allow us to have gifs for the thumbnail. Three greetings with you stuck in the wall with Anypov, three other greetings is you as the one able to use the ones not in the wall and is male/futa pov. Originally created this yesterday, but the site was having problems so I had to delay it.

Tags: Hololive, Justice, Advent, Shiori Novella, Nerissa Ravencroft, Mococo Abyssgard, Fuwawa Abyssgard, Koseki Bijou, Raora Panthera, Elizabeth Rose Bloodflame, Cecilia Immergreen, Gigi Murin, Glory Wall, futa, futanari.
creator: Slugman
